feedbackEmptyState.title: No feedback yet

createDialog.title: New poll
createDialog.description: Ask members a multiple-choice question with an expiry date.

editDialog.title: Edit poll
editDialog.description: Options cannot be edited here — changing them after votes are cast would invalidate existing results. Delete and recreate the poll if the options need to change.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this poll?
deleteDialog.descriptionSuffix: will be permanently removed, along with all votes.

form.questionPlaceholder: e.g. Should we hold the AGM in person this year?

toast.optionsRequired: At least two options are required

vacancies.title: Vacancies
vacancies.description: Only open vacancies with a future deadline are shown here — closed or expired postings are hidden from this list.

createDialog.title: Post a new vacancy
createDialog.description: Visible to members immediately, until the deadline passes or you close it early.

detail.noApplicantsDescription: Applications submitted for this vacancy will appear here.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this vacancy?
confirmDelete.description: This permanently removes the vacancy and every application submitted to it. This can't be undone.

members.title: Members
members.description: Approve new sign-ups and manage federation member accounts.

createDialog.description: Creates an account with immediate access — no approval step needed.

confirmReject.title: Reject this registration?
confirmReject.description: 's account request will be deleted. They can sign up again later.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this member?
confirmDelete.description: will be permanently removed. This fails if they still own a business listing.
